results.title: NDA hails PM Modi’s 12-year governance milestone, calls it era of ‘Performance
results.description: The National Democratic Alliance (NDA) on Wednesday passed a resolution marking 12 years of the Narendra Modi-led Union government, describing it as a defining phase of “people-centric development, participative democracy and performance-oriented governance”. The resolution was adopted at a high-level NDA meeting in New Delhi, where coalition allies congratulated Prime Minister Narendra Modi for ... The post NDA hails PM Modi’s 12-year governance milestone, calls it era of ‘Performance appeared first on Central Chronicle .

results.title: Law firms cheated in filing claims with NFL’s $1 billion concussion settlement fund, report says
results.description: Five law firms representing 98 NFL players have been accused of scheming to defraud the NFL's concussion settlement fund

results.title: Hyderabad firm booked for forging 199 test reports to HAL
results.description: Bengaluru: A Hyderabad-based company, TEC Aero Devices, has been booked for allegedly submitting 199 forged test reports to HAL in connection with supplies for the LCA Mk-1A project. Based on a complaint lodged by Ranu Gupta, Deputy General Manager of HAL’s Aircraft Division, the FIR was registered on June 2 at the HAL police station. ...
